note: Vertical2 defaults to a real vertical two-cell tray span; occupied slots=0;5; secondary slot is visually reserved.
Popup Rotate changes Vertical2 to a horizontal two-cell tray span.
Popup Rotate toggles the x2 item back to vertical.

action: Info popup Rotate button at right edge
note: Out-of-bounds popup rotation is rejected and the previous vertical placement remains.
Initial state is idle before item interaction.
Single click refreshes item info only; it does not begin placement or rotate.
Dragging the x2 item starts the V0.4 placement session.
Dragging over the board creates a same-shape ghost preview.
Valid release commits directly without ghost click confirm.
Controller does not call TapGhostToConfirm or ReleaseDragLockPreview.
Invalid release cancels the active drag and returns the item to tray without board commit.
Cancel clears active drag/session without board commit.
